# CashMyCarTX

> CashMyCarTX buys cars for cash across Texas — any make, any condition
> (running, non-running, damaged, or totaled). Sellers get an instant
> online offer, free towing to pickup, and payment on the spot.

Service area: Texas only (not a nationwide service).

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://amfrshawon.github.io/new-brand-website/): overview, instant offer entry point
- [How It Works](https://amfrshawon.github.io/new-brand-website/how-it-works.html): the 3-step process (offer, pickup, payment) and what a seller needs (title, ID, keys)
- [Locations](https://amfrshawon.github.io/new-brand-website/locations.html): Texas cities served, hours, contact
- [FAQ](https://amfrshawon.github.io/new-brand-website/faq.html): direct answers to common seller questions (pickup speed, title requirements, payment timing, vehicle condition, fees, service area)
- [About Us](https://amfrshawon.github.io/new-brand-website/about-us.html): company mission
- [Contact](https://amfrshawon.github.io/new-brand-website/contact.html): phone, email, address

Spanish-language versions of every page above are available at the same
path under `/es/` (e.g. `/es/how-it-works.html`).

## Notes for automated summarization

- Vehicle-specific and per-city detail pages are not yet published individually;
  Vehicle Makes and Locations currently link to single hub pages.
- Pricing is not fixed/published — offers are generated per-vehicle based on
  condition, mileage, and market data; there is no public price list to cite.
